Vendored (not CDN-loaded, to keep the dashboard fully offline-capable):

- `three.module.js` + `three.core.js` — Three.js r180 (three@0.180.0), MIT license.
  Source: https://unpkg.com/three@0.180.0/build/
  Re-fetch with: `curl -sL -o three.module.js https://unpkg.com/three@0.180.0/build/three.module.js`
  and the same for `three.core.js`.
